title: Treebo Hotels is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Treebo Hotels is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Treebo Hotels invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Bhopal location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Treebo Hotels:
Treebo Hotels is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Treebo Hotels!
